# omv_shared_folder (Resource)

An OpenMediaVault shared folder (ShareMgmt).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up the filesystem to host the shared folder.
data "omv_filesystems" "all" {}

resource "omv_shared_folder" "example" {
  name      = "example"
  comment   = "example share"
  mntentref = data.omv_filesystems.all.filesystems[0].uuid
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mntentref` (String) UUID of the filesystem (mntent) the folder lives on. See the omv_filesystems data source.
- `name` (String) Shared folder name.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Comment. Defaults to the name.
- `recursive` (Boolean) On destroy, whether to also delete the folder's contents on disk. Default false (removes the share but keeps the data).
- `reldirpath` (String) Relative directory path. Defaults to <name>/.

### Read-Only

- `mountpoint` (String) Absolute mountpoint of the filesystem.
- `uuid` (String) OMV-assigned shared folder UUID.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Shared folders are imported by their OMV UUID.
terraform import omv_shared_folder.example 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000
```
